title: CartoonMC
description: Fabric 1.20.1 | This modpack radically changes the game making it cartoonish
body:
This modpack radically changes the game making it cartoonish.
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/822535a9a5b0ab508ea29a924141fd67c069bd5f.png)
The main new features of the modpack are:
- Cartoon graphics
- New sounds
- Better combat
- Better third person
- New visual effects
<details>
<summary>Main Mods & Resourcepacks</summary>

- Bare Bones
- Fresh Animations
- Extended Lantern
- Advancement Plaques
- Ambient Sounds
- Better Combat
- Biome Particle Weather
- Eating Animations
- Falling Leaves
- Serious Player Animations
- Shoulder Surfing Reloaded
- Sound Physics Remastered
- Visuality
- Wakes

</details>
